_comment: Cloudflare Zero Trust Access — self-hosted application protecting the media PWA. Create via the Zero Trust dashboard (Access → Applications → Add → Self-hosted) or the API/Terraform. This JSON mirrors the POST /accounts/{account_id}/access/apps body.
name: INVISABLE Media
_policies_note: Attach the two policies below (allow Stephen, then default-deny). Order matters: the allow is evaluated first; everything else falls through to the deny.

policies.name: Allow Stephen
policies._options: Add { "email_domain": { "domain": "invisable.co.uk" } } to include to allow the whole company; add Google/Microsoft as identity providers in Zero Trust → Settings → Authentication; turn on one-time PIN by enabling the One-time PIN login method.

_device_posture_later: Once enrolled with WARP, add a require block referencing a device posture check (e.g. disk encryption / serial number) to the Allow policy.
